summary: Frontend testing complete for expiry-date sync bug fix. All test cases passed. The fix (adding 'await' to fetchData() in handleSaveEvidenceEdit) ensures expiry status badges update immediately after editing evidence metadata. Tested: (1) Change expiry to past date -> status changes to 'Expired' immediately, (2) Change expiry to future date -> status changes to 'Valid' immediately, (3) Status persists correctly after page refresh.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: ✅ Navigate to Lawrence Egbeni profile - SUCCESS
✅ Go to What's Needed tab - SUCCESS
✅ Find Health & Safety Training with 'Valid until 2027-06-15' - SUCCESS
✅ Click dropdown menu on Health & Safety Training - SUCCESS
✅ Change expiry date to past date (2024-01-01) - SUCCESS
✅ Verify expiry badge changes to 'Expired 2024-01-01' IMMEDIATELY - SUCCESS
✅ Change expiry date to future date (2028-12-31) - SUCCESS
✅ Verify expiry badge changes to 'Valid until 2028-12-31' IMMEDIATELY - SUCCESS
✅ Refresh page - verify status persists correctly - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: The fix is correctly implemented - 'await fetchData()' on line 1106 ensures data refresh completes before UI updates
Minor: DialogContent accessibility warning should be addressed by adding DialogDescription component
seed_data_creation: Used existing data - Lawrence Egbeni (OCS-0002, ID: ccfcbdbb-feda-4043-a8b2-2f1f9da88bdf). Health & Safety Training file_id: 61fd8ffc-c76d-4b7b-8f69-d222f35ed980. Expiry date restored to original value: 2027-06-15
context_for_next_testing_agent: Expiry-date sync bug fix verified. The handleSaveEvidenceEdit function now properly awaits fetchData() after saving, ensuring immediate UI updates. Key test data: Employee Lawrence Egbeni (ccfcbdbb-feda-4043-a8b2-2f1f9da88bdf), Health & Safety Training requirement (health_safety), file_id (61fd8ffc-c76d-4b7b-8f69-d222f35ed980). The Edit Details dialog is accessible via data-testid='more-actions-health_safety' -> data-testid='edit-details-health_safety'. Expiry date field is the second date input in the dialog. Reason for Change is required (second textarea).

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The fetchData() call after saving evidence edits was not awaited, causing the UI to update before the data refresh completed
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added 'await' keyword before fetchData() call on line 1106 of EmployeeProfilePage.js
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Tested by changing expiry date to past (Expired status) and future (Valid status) dates - both updated immediately without page refresh
